title: Media Studio — photo / image editor
description: OS app: a lightweight photo/social studio. Tool rail, a checkerboard canvas stage with live CSS `filter` adjustments and per-layer clip masks, safe-area guides (TikTok/Reels/IG/YouTube), text/shape/sticker/image(URL)/HTML-embed layers, per-layer custom CSS, debounced undo+redo, and JSON/HTML export + import. Client-only, no backend.
